features.title: Product Vision
features.tldr: Pi-only rebuild of dadaia-workspace ideas: SDD-native, multi-project, memory-backed, and lifecycle-governed.
features.summary: Defines the product identity and non-goals for dadaia-pi-workspace. It preserves the ideas of dadaia-workspace without carrying its multi-harness implementation.

features.title: Spec Context Projects
features.tldr: One canonical specs tree bound to one repository, session-bindable for Pi.
features.summary: Defines the central unit of work in dadaia-pi-workspace: a repository governed by a committed specs tree and a workspace registry record.

features.title: Pi-Native Agent Surface
features.tldr: The agentic surface is Pi resources only: extensions, skills, prompt templates, packages, settings, and AGENTS.md.
features.summary: Defines how dadaia-pi-workspace uses Pi's documented extension points instead of projecting assets for other harnesses.

features.title: SDD Lifecycle Governance
features.tldr: SPEC/PLAN/TASKS approval, additive evidence, mutating leases, review checkpoints, and closure memory updates.
features.summary: Defines the lifecycle rules that make Pi sessions safe and organized across multiple repos.
